boundary: benchmark reproduction readiness only; maps paper reproduction requirements to existing offline artifacts and readiness reports without contacting Harbor, Docker, registries, scanners, PyPI, Sigstore, scanner databases, model providers, or cloud services, and never claims benchmark reproduction

checks.detail: readiness dependency not provisioned: Docker daemon=blocked, Harbor registry endpoint=blocked; missing non-empty artifact for class live_terminal_bench_split_manifest

metadata.notes: The local toy and dry-run fixtures are not the paper's fixed 64-case live evaluation split. Bundle verification applies cross_artifact_split_evaluation_coverage so repeat-evaluation task ids must equal this fixed split, cross_artifact_capture_run_id_binding so primary live evidence belongs to one capture run, and cross_artifact_harbor_version_binding so split evidence must match the bundled live Harbor preflight environment.

checks.detail: readiness dependency not provisioned: GLM-5.2 model API credentials=blocked, MiniMax M2.5 model API credentials=blocked, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model deployment=blocked; missing non-empty artifact for class proposer_context_manifest

metadata.notes: This artifact binds proposer request traffic to the four paper-required bounded context ingredients without storing full raw prompts, traces, or responses in the reproduction bundle. Bundle verification applies cross_artifact_capture_run_id_binding and cross_artifact_proposer_context_binding so context rounds align with proposer LLM rounds, fixed protocol Self-Harness rounds, non-empty ingredient evidence whenever proposals are attempted, and pairwise-distinct editable-surface sha256 values within each context round. It also applies cross_artifact_proposer_previous_edits_binding so previous attempted edits bind to prior proposer rounds, targeted mechanism hashes, optional causal_status_sha256 values, edited surface hashes, audit decisions, and pairwise-distinct (proposal_round_index, targeted_mechanism_sha256, edited_surface_sha256) signatures within each context round, plus cross_artifact_proposer_context_evidence_binding so each context round's held-in failure pattern task_ids cover exactly that round's baseline held-in failing task set, optional failure_category values match disclosed baseline task failure categories, optional shared_symptoms_sha256 and verifier_evidence_sha256 values are validated and recorded for paper Section 3.2 cluster evidence, optional presentation_order and actionability_hint_sha256 values are validated and recorded for the paper cluster-ordering contract, and each passing behavior summary covers exactly that round's baseline held-in passing task set as disclosed by proposal_validation_manifest.baseline_split_outcomes.task_outcomes, with passing summary task_id_set_sha256 strictly recomputed from those task_ids. Held-in failure patterns in the same round must carry distinct (failure_category, causal_status_sha256, mechanism_sha256) signatures and pairwise-disjoint task_ids so exact-match paper clusters cannot duplicate the same failure signature or assign one failing task to multiple clusters. When presentation_order is declared, it must form a contiguous permutation and larger size values must precede smaller size values; equal-size ties may be ordered by actionability. Capture-manifest diffing also emits proposer-context-evidence-derivation to compare realized proposer context task coverage, editable-surface duplicate counts, previous-attempted-edit duplicate counts, failure-pattern task-overlap counts, failure categories, causal-status hashes, shared-symptom hashes, verifier-evidence hashes, presentation order, and actionability-hint hashes against the planned held-in split. support_rank is not stored.

checks.paper_reference: Section 3.3 Harness Proposal; bounded proposal context includes editable surfaces, held-in failure patterns, passing behavior summaries, and previous attempted edits

checks.detail: readiness dependency not provisioned: GLM-5.2 model API credentials=blocked, Harbor registry endpoint=blocked, MiniMax M2.5 model API credentials=blocked, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model deployment=blocked; missing non-empty artifact for class proposal_validation_manifest

metadata.notes: This artifact is derived from the audit directory after capture, not authored by the proposer. Bundle verification applies cross_artifact_capture_run_id_binding and cross_artifact_proposal_validation_binding so validation rounds bind to the fixed protocol hash, Self-Harness round count, proposal width, proposer attempted/committed counts, proposer request/response hashes when declared, two-repeat evaluation metadata, proposer-context current candidate grounding, proposer-context previous attempted edits, canonical live split totals, proposal-validation task outcomes when present, Algorithm 1 split-outcome lineage continuity for no-op, single-commit, and declared multi-commit transitions with merged split-outcome evidence, optional harness-state hash continuity for no-op, single-commit, and declared multi-commit transitions, and the Section 3.4 acceptance rule. Within each round, candidate split_outcomes.evaluation_repeats must match baseline_split_outcomes.evaluation_repeats before aggregate pass-count validation is trusted. cross_artifact_proposer_context_evidence_binding also requires same-round baseline task_outcomes when proposer context is bundled, because weakness mining at round t must be derived from the current harness h_t rather than the final post-commit evaluation. Current candidates must target same-round proposer-context failure mechanisms, candidates with changed surfaces must bind to same-round editable surface hashes and names, and candidate mechanism/surface signatures must be distinct within each round. Accepted and merged candidates must improve at least one split, degrade neither split versus their round baseline, and target pairwise-distinct editable surface hashes within the round before the paper Algorithm 1 MERGEACCEPTED compatibility step is trusted. It records changed surfaces plus non-empty rejection reasons for rejected, superseded, and invalid candidates. Invalid candidates also carry validation_failure_category, closed to no_editable_surface or execution_failure; no_editable_surface is the only candidate category allowed to have empty changed_surfaces. Every non-no_editable_surface candidate must declare exactly one changed surface. Optional task_outcomes disclose task-level split/pass evidence and must reconcile with aggregate split counts; failing task rows may carry closed terminal failure_category values, which bind proposer-context failure patterns back to same-round baseline terminal causes. Optional paired harness_before_sha256 and harness_after_sha256 fields bind validation evidence to audit lineage harness states when extraction can derive them; legacy manifests may omit both. Multi-commit rounds that declare harness hashes also declare harness_after_merged_sha256, derived from the same lineage harness_after_hash, so the next round can bind to the merged harness state. They also declare merged_split_outcomes, derived from proposal_id __merge__ candidate audit rows, so the next baseline can bind to an independent merged-harness split observation. Optional proposer_round_request_sha256 and proposer_round_response_sha256 bind validation evidence to the shaped proposer_llm_request_log without storing raw prompts or responses. Capture-manifest diffing compares single-surface violation counts, harness-hash presence counts, multi-commit merged-hash values, merged split-outcome presence and digest, candidate changed-surface names, accepted/merged surface hashes, and task-outcome digest v2 content so rehearsal plans catch multi-surface, surface-name, MERGEACCEPTED surface-set, lineage-hash-presence, merged-hash, merged split-outcome, and terminal-category drift. Validation pass counts are not compared with the final post-commit two-repeat evaluation because baseline and per-candidate rows describe different harness states.

checks.paper_reference: Section 3.4 Proposal Validation; candidate harnesses are evaluated, accepted, rejected, merged, or invalidated against the fixed validation protocol

checks.detail: readiness dependency not provisioned: Docker daemon=blocked; missing non-empty artifact for class container_image_trust_report

metadata.notes: Offline image-policy and scanner fixtures are release evidence, not live container runtime evidence. Bundle verification applies cross_artifact_capture_run_id_binding so image trust evidence must belong to the same live capture run as the other primary artifacts. When live Harbor audit rows record image_digest, cross_artifact_audit_image_binding also requires the executed audit image digest set to match this trust report. For multi-arch Harbor manifests, trust report child_digests bind executed audit digests to per-platform children rather than parent manifest digests.
